ship_types.name: Shuttle
ship_types.description: A basic spacecraft suitable for learning the trade. Limited cargo capacity but reliable.

ship_types.name: Light Freighter
ship_types.description: The workhorse of independent traders. Good balance of cargo capacity and fuel efficiency.

ship_types.name: Medium Freighter
ship_types.description: A substantial upgrade offering significantly more cargo space for profitable bulk trading.

ship_types.name: Fast Courier
ship_types.description: Sacrifices cargo space for speed. Ideal for time-sensitive luxury goods or emergency deliveries.

ship_types.name: Bulk Hauler
ship_types.description: Massive cargo vessel designed for serious traders. Slow but incredibly profitable on the right routes.

ship_types.name: Luxury Yacht
ship_types.description: An executive vessel with moderate cargo but exceptional crew facilities. Improves crew morale and enables unique opportunities.
